text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With France eight hours behind... El should also be training about
now.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder, despite being the favorite to win, takes sixth after
losing steam in the homestretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Though she dominated her junior year, it seems her classic-year
struggles continue even after her unfortunate injury!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My apologies... Had I won here, I hoped to join you and Spe for the
Japan Cup, but unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That is no longer possible. Not like this...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This won't do.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass! Why are you being so wishy-washy lately?! That is not who you are!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The Grass I know is composed, but deep in her heart, she burns with
passion! In fact, it is when you are quiet that you are the scariest!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
After the Japan Cup, I'll be going abroad to achieve my dream of
being the world's strongest.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But once I'm back, I want to race you again! So before then, I expect you to get much, muuuch stronger!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you don’t, there's no way you'll be able to handle me, the world's
strongest!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...You're quite right.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I mustn't falter here... My gaze must be fixed ahead.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While you are away proving yourself the world's strongest, I shall
prove I am the strongest in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: By overtaking our generation's Derby Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Takarazuka Kinen on everyone's minds, a press conference is
held featuring all the participating racers.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of hot topics, this'll be the first time Special Week and
Grass Wonder face off.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's the showdown everyone's been waiting for—the Derby
Umamusume Vs. the Grand Prix Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us begin today's conference with Team Sirius. Special Week,
please take to the stage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for coming!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
After three graded race wins in a row, are you feeling good going into
the Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Practice is going smoothly as always, so I don't see any issues
popping up.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
If you win the Takarazuka Kinen, rumor is your next goal will be the
Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe, but is this true?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If my trainer decides I have the potential to do well there, I will be
going abroad!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: I see. So this race will be the deciding factor.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Now then, this will be your first race against Grass Wonder. How do
you view your opponent?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass's performance at last year's Arima Kinen was amazing. It's no
small wonder that she won.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: However, that won't shake me up one bit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Coming off of my victory in the spring Tenno Sho, I won't lose, even
to Grass!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uraaugh! Goooo, legs, goooo!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Don't put too much power into your run! Keep your form in mind!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Foooorm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is closer than ever, and following that, Special
Week takes her training and motivation up a notch.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Uwaaugh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Your time's even better than yesterday! That's amazing, Spe!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, take a lap as a cooldown, and then we'll move on to some
training on the dirt course.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, take a lap as a cooldown, and then we'll move on to some
training on the dirt course.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... Right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It seems both her condition and attitude are in perfect order.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
That just shows how much she wants to win the Takarazuka Kinen.
And I want to help make that happen.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
That just shows how much she wants to win the Takarazuka Kinen.
And I want to help make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I'm also excited to see Spe become the best racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So let me know if there's anything I can do! As long as it doesn't
involve using my head, I'm game!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, I will offer any assistance I can. I love to see our teammates
succeed, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now, let us claim victory at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's a promise!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Last year, after Silence Suzuka crossed the finish line, she took off for
the world. Even now, her name sends her fans into an uproar!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And we're back today to do it all again! Welcome to today's main
race at Hanshin Racecourse—the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The crowd anxiously awaits the first showdown between Special
Week and Grass Wonder, but there's no telling who will take home
the crown!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There ya go. Nice and calm. If you keep a cool head like you did at
the spring Tenno Sho, you'll have this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For once, Gold Ship's words actually make sense. You must focus on
your own running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Keep a cool head, and focus on my running... You got it!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is what decides the best racer of the first half
of the year.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You've put in more than enough work to win this race. If it pays off
here, your next stop is the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: One by one, today's racers are entering the course!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: There's Special Week! Oh man, listen to those cheers!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
What did you expect? She took first in the fan polls! Special Week!
You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I've done everything I can, and I'm in tip-top shape... I'm a
little nervous, but those nerves are keeping me focused!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I can do this!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It seems the time has come, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It may have taken a while, but today, we're running together at long
last.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I fell in love with the Twinkle Series as a child... and now, it is my
dream to stand at its peak.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: In order to do that, I must surpass both you and El.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't make it easy, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well then... may the best racer win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Each Umamusume has entered her gate.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will the winner be Special Week? Grass Wonder? Or another
talented racer altogether?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We'll find out with the finale of the Twinkle Series spring season, the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Their fans in the stands and across Japan watch on with hope as our
twelve racers... take off!
